CORY
KROME

3D ARTIST  ·  ENVIRONMENT DESIGNER  ·  INDIE GAME CREATOR

Building anime-inspired, stylized worlds from the ground up — cell-shaded environments, retro 32–64 bit aesthetics, custom vending machine textures, arcade cabinet art, and full convention-scale esports arenas. Working toward selling texture packs and asset packs for games.

// FEATURED WORK

PROJECTS

IN PROGRESS

CONVENTION GAME ROOM

// 3D ENVIRONMENT · ESPORTS ARENA · STYLIZED

A full-scale convention gaming space built in Blender — from a 32-player PC zone and tournament main stage to arcade cabinets with hand-crafted 2D pixel art game screens.

  • 32-player PC gaming setup with custom gaming chairs
  • Main esports tournament stage with rig lighting + big screens
  • Arcade cabinets: Street Racer, Gun'em, Western Showdown
  • Fantasy Soda vending machine with 8 custom-textured flavors
  • Convention entrance gate with security queue layout
  • Mixed 2D texture art + 3D modeling (Blender + Krita)
COMPLETION85%
// ARCADE ZONE

ARCADE CABINET LINEUP

Street Racer, Gun'em, and Western Showdown with unique 2D pixel art screens painted in Krita. Neon floor lighting applied.

// ARCADE ZONE

SWORDS & SHIELDS · WESTERN SHOWDOWN

Close-up of both cabinets showing custom pixel art screens and hand-painted cabinet art in full detail.

// PC GAMING ZONE

32-PLAYER PC ZONE

Blue partition chairs, dual-monitor stations, and vending machine visible in the background. All assets modeled in Blender.

// PROP ART

FANTASY SODA MACHINE

8 original soda flavors — Ice Sword, Pink Princess, Dark Portal, Queen's Purple, Hell's Orange, and more. Each label hand-painted in Krita.

// ENVIRONMENT

CONVENTION ENTRANCE GATE

Sci-fi security gate with hexagonal neon paneling, crowd barriers, and ticketing booths.

// ENVIRONMENT

ENTRY QUEUE LAYOUT

Early blockout establishing spatial scale, flow, and architectural framing for the full venue.

// 2D ART & TEXTURES

TEXTURE WORK

Custom-painted in Krita using a stylized, anime-inspired aesthetic rooted in 32-bit art traditions. Each texture is designed to bring personality to 3D models. Future texture packs will be sold as game-ready assets.

ICE SWORD SODA

Snowflake mandala with central sword motif. Fantasy RPG themed.

PINK PRINCESS SODA

Jeweled crown label with sparkle effects. Anime magical-girl palette.

DARK PORTAL SODA

Swirling purple void with yellow energy ring.

QUEENS PURPLE SODA

Royal crown on vivid magenta. Regal in every pixel.

HELL'S ORANGE SODA

Fiery lava texture with scorched earth tones.

MOUNTAIN CHERRY SODA

Bold red diagonal design with illustrated cherry art.

SOUR LIME SODA

Bright lime greens on a bold diagonal layout.

CREAMED SPICE SODA

Warm vanilla and spice tones with star anise motifs.

🎨

Full stylized anime environment texture pack — coming soon.
